mapper.sql: select sp.sample_id, a.article_id, a.manuscript_id, a.file_no, a.year_no, a.period, a.journal_code, COALESCE(i.meeting_id, y.meeting_id) as meeting_id, COALESCE(sp.payee_name, '') as payee_name, COALESCE(sp.payee_address, '') as payee_address, COALESCE(sp.payee_org, '') as payee_org, COALESCE(sp.payee_zip, '') as payee_zip, COALESCE(sp.payee_phone, '') as payee_phone, COALESCE(sp.sample_qty, 1) as sample_qty, sp.create_by, sp.create_time, sp.update_by, sp.update_time, sp.remark, COALESCE(m.author_names, a.author_names, '') as submit_author, SUBSTRING_INDEX(COALESCE(a.author_names, m.author_names, ''), ',', 1) as first_author, COALESCE(m.corresponding_author, '') as corresponding_author, fa.address as first_author_address, fa.affiliation as first_author_org, fa.zip_code as first_author_zip, COALESCE(fa.mobile, fa.phone, '') as first_author_phone, ca.address as corresponding_address, ca.affiliation as corresponding_org, ca.zip_code as corresponding_zip, COALESCE(ca.mobile, ca.phone, '') as corresponding_phone, sa.address as submit_author_address, sa.affiliation as submit_author_org, sa.zip_code as submit_author_zip, COALESCE(sa.mobile, sa.phone, '') as submit_author_phone from publisher_article a left join publisher_sample_post sp on a.article_id = sp.article_id left join editor_manuscript m on a.manuscript_id = m.manuscript_id left join publisher_issue i on a.issue_id = i.issue_id left join publisher_year y on i.year_id = y.year_id left join ( select ema.manuscript_id, ea.address, ea.affiliation, ea.zip_code, ea.mobile, ea.phone from editor_manuscript_author ema inner join editor_author ea on ema.author_id = ea.author_id where ema.author_sort = ( select min(ema2.author_sort) from editor_manuscript_author ema2 where ema2.manuscript_id = ema.manuscript_id ) ) fa on a.manuscript_id = fa.manuscript_id left join ( select ema.manuscript_id, ea.address, ea.affiliation, ea.zip_code, ea.mobile, ea.phone from editor_manuscript_author ema inner join editor_author ea on ema.author_id = ea.author_id where ema.is_corresponding = '1' ) ca on a.manuscript_id = ca.manuscript_id left join ( select ema.manuscript_id, ea.address, ea.affiliation, ea.zip_code, ea.mobile, ea.phone from editor_manuscript_author ema inner join editor_author ea on ema.author_id = ea.author_id where ema.author_id = ( select ema2.author_id from editor_manuscript_author ema2 where ema2.manuscript_id = ema.manuscript_id order by ema2.author_sort asc limit 1 ) ) sa on a.manuscript_id = sa.manuscript_id
